moments.title: Wimbledon Finals Week
moments.blurb: The Championships at Wimbledon continue this week, building towards the Ladies' and Gentlemen's Singles Finals on Saturday and Sunday.

angles.name: Tennis Buzz
angles.copy: It's finals week at Wimbledon! Who are you backing for the Ladies' and Gentlemen's titles this weekend?

angles.name: Road to the Final
angles.copy: The grass court action is heating up at Wimbledon! Expect some epic semi-final clashes before the trophies are lifted.

moments.title: Goodwood Festival of Speed
moments.blurb: The Goodwood Festival of Speed kicks off tomorrow, running from July 9th to 12th, showcasing historic motorsports and future technology.

angles.name: Engines Revving
angles.copy: Get ready for the roar! The Goodwood Festival of Speed starts tomorrow, bringing together the best of past and future motoring.

angles.name: Speed Thrills
angles.copy: From classic cars to cutting-edge concepts, Goodwood Festival of Speed promises four days of high-octane excitement starting Thursday.

moments.title: Wireless Festival (Ye Headlining)
moments.blurb: Wireless Festival takes over Finsbury Park, London, from July 10th to 12th, with Ye (Kanye West) headlining all three nights in his first UK show in over a decade.

angles.name: Ye Takes Over
angles.copy: Wireless Festival is almost here! Ye is headlining all three nights at Finsbury Park, kicking off Friday. Ready for a weekend of huge tracks?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: North London, get ready! Wireless Festival lands this weekend with Ye performing across all three days. Who's got tickets?

moments.title: BST Hyde Park Final Weekend
moments.blurb: American Express presents BST Hyde Park concludes this weekend, with Pitbull performing on Friday, July 10th, and Lewis Capaldi wrapping things up with two headline shows on July 11th and 12th.

angles.name: Hyde Park Finale
angles.copy: The final weekend of BST Hyde Park is here! Pitbull takes the stage Friday, then Lewis Capaldi for two massive nights to close out the festival.

angles.name: Capaldi Closes
angles.copy: Lewis Capaldi closes out BST Hyde Park this weekend with two highly anticipated shows. What song are you hoping to hear?

moments.title: 2000trees Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The 2000trees Festival, a celebration of alternative music, is happening now in Gloucestershire from July 8th to 11th.

angles.name: Trees Rock On
angles.copy: Who's at 2000trees Festival right now? The rock and alternative party in Gloucestershire is in full swing until Saturday!

angles.name: Gloucestershire Gigs
angles.copy: Day one of 2000trees Festival! Expect heavy riffs and good vibes from this year's lineup.

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' holds the top spot on the Official UK Singles Chart for a remarkable 15th non-consecutive week.

angles.name: #1 Reign
angles.copy: Still at number one! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' continues its incredible run at the top of the UK Singles Chart.

angles.name: Chart Topper
angles.copy: 15 weeks at #1 for Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is proving unstoppable on the UK Official Singles Chart.

moments.title: Madonna's 'Danceteria' set to climb
moments.blurb: Madonna's new track 'Danceteria' is on course for a high new entry on the Official UK Singles Chart, following the release of 'CONFESSIONS II'.

angles.name: Queen of Pop Returns
angles.copy: Madonna is back and set for a big week! Her new track 'Danceteria' is trending for a high new entry on the charts.

angles.name: New Music Alert
angles.copy: Look out for Madonna's 'Danceteria' making waves on the Official Charts this week. The Queen of Pop still reigns!

moments.title: Love Island UK Drama Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, which began on June 1st, is currently airing Sunday to Friday, bringing daily villa drama to ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Villa Vibes
angles.copy: The Love Island drama is well underway! Who's your favourite couple, and who's bringing the heat to the villa tonight?

angles.name: Grafting Season
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of Love Island! Catch all the latest recouplings and bombshells on ITV2 and ITVX.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Beck
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter and multi-instrumentalist Beck turns 56 today. (Born July 8, 1970).

angles.name: Modern Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to the one and only Beck! What's your go-to track from the genre-bending legend?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jaden Smith
moments.blurb: Actor, rapper, and singer Jaden Smith celebrates his 28th birthday today. (Born July 8, 1998).

angles.name: Young Talent
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 28th Birthday to Jaden Smith! From acting to music, he's always pushing boundaries.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Courtney Love
moments.blurb: Hole frontwoman and cultural icon Courtney Love turns 62 tomorrow. (Born July 9, 1964).

angles.name: Grunge Queen
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Courtney Love celebrates her 62nd birthday! What's your favourite Hole anthem?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jack White
moments.blurb: The White Stripes and Raconteurs frontman, Jack White, celebrates his 51st birthday tomorrow. (Born July 9, 1975).

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the phenomenal Jack White turns 51! What's the ultimate White Stripes or Raconteurs track for you?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jim Kerr
moments.blurb: Simple Minds lead singer Jim Kerr turns 67 tomorrow. (Born July 9, 1959).

angles.name: Simple Minds Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 67th Birthday to Simple Minds' iconic frontman, Jim Kerr, tomorrow!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Jessica Simpson
moments.blurb: Pop singer and actress Jessica Simpson celebrates her 46th birthday on Friday. (Born July 10, 1980).

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Flashback to the 00s! Jessica Simpson turns 46 on Friday. What's your favourite track from the pop star?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Suzanne Vega
moments.blurb: American singer-songwriter Suzanne Vega, known for 'Luka' and 'Tom's Diner', turns 67 on Saturday. (Born July 11, 1959).

angles.name: Folk-Pop Queen
angles.copy: Happy 67th Birthday this Saturday to the iconic Suzanne Vega! Which of her timeless tracks is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Richie Sambora
moments.blurb: Former Bon Jovi guitarist and rock legend Richie Sambora celebrates his 67th birthday on Saturday. (Born July 11, 1959).

angles.name: Rock Guitar Icon
angles.copy: This Saturday, rock legend Richie Sambora from Bon Jovi turns 67! What's your favourite Bon Jovi guitar solo?

moments.title: The Open Golf Practice Days Begin
moments.blurb: Practice days for The 154th Open Championship begin on Sunday, July 12th, at Royal Birkdale, ahead of the main tournament.

angles.name: Golf's Greatest
angles.copy: The Open Championship action begins this Sunday with practice days at Royal Birkdale. Golf's oldest major is nearly here!

angles.name: Birkdale Bound
angles.copy: The world's best golfers arrive at Royal Birkdale this weekend for practice ahead of The 154th Open Championship.

moments.title: ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final
moments.blurb: The ICC Women's T20 World Cup, hosted by England and Wales, concludes with the final match on Sunday, July 12th.

angles.name: Cricket Final
angles.copy: It all comes down to this! The ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final is this Sunday. Who will lift the trophy?

angles.name: Home Advantage?
angles.copy: England & Wales host the ICC Women's T20 World Cup Final this weekend. Can the home nations make it a memorable one?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kenny G
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning smooth jazz saxophonist Kenny G turns 70 on Monday. (Born July 13, 1956).

angles.name: Smooth Jazz Legend
angles.copy: On Monday, the legendary Kenny G celebrates his 70th birthday! What's your favourite smooth sax tune?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Taboo
moments.blurb: Black Eyed Peas member Taboo (Jaime Luis Gomez) turns 51 on Tuesday. (Born July 14, 1975).

angles.name: Black Eyed Peas Star
angles.copy: Wishing a Happy 51st Birthday to Taboo from Black Eyed Peas this Tuesday! What's your favourite BEP anthem?
